title: Fault-Aware Decision Support for Renewable-Powered EV Charging Stations Using Multi-Source Explainable Learning
description: Reproducible synthetic EVCS benchmark pipeline for fault-aware decision support in renewable-powered electric vehicle charging stations. The repository includes synthetic data generation, fault/anomaly injection, window-based feature extraction, supervised and anomaly/open-set model evaluation, source-level explainability, risk-state mapping, operational-response analysis, fixed random seeds, and scripts used to generate the reported tables and figures.

creators.name: Nassreddine, Ghalia
creators.affiliation: Computer and Information Systems Department, Mechref
